subcategory: streaming card carousel with scanner effects
use_cases: Displaying product cards in a horizontally streaming carousel with continuous motion
Creating hero sections with animated card streams and visual scan effects
Building media galleries with ASCII scramble and clip scan effects
Showcasing content collections with pause/play speed controls
Adding tech-forward card displays with Three.js-powered animations
ai_summary: A horizontally streaming card carousel component featuring Three.js-powered scanner effects including ASCII character scrambling and clip transitions. Cards scroll continuously with configurable speed, direction, and friction physics. Includes built-in pause/play controls and speed indicator for interactive user experience. Ideal for showcasing product cards, media content, or collection displays with a modern tech aesthetic.
